description: Perform a hexagonal binning (hexbin) analysis to visualize urban population density in Europe using the populated places layer located at '/home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_10m_populated_places/ne_10m_populated_places.shp'. Generate a hexagonal grid covering the European extent (West: -15, South: 35, East: 45, North: 72) with horizontal and vertical spacing of 3 degrees. For each hexagon, calculate the number of cities and the sum of their population using the 'POP_MAX' field. Filter the analysis to include only hexagons that contain at least one city (count > 0) and export the final result as a GeoJSON to '/home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/europe_hexbin_population.geojson'.
